question.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.

source.name: Conjunctions — and, but, or, because, so

variants.text: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.

hints.hint:
'Because' introduces the ideological justification for the authoritarian suppression of dissent.
The first part `suppressed dissent ruthlessly` is the action; `opposition was perceived as an existential threat` is the ideological justification.

'Because' wprowadza ideologiczne uzasadnienie autorytarnego tłumienia opozycji.
Pierwsza część `suppressed dissent ruthlessly` to działanie; `opposition was perceived as an existential threat` to ideologiczne uzasadnienie.

Сполучник because вводить підрядне речення, що розкриває мотивацію або ідеологічну основу авторитарних дій.
Перша частина `suppressed dissent ruthlessly` — дія, а `was perceived as an existential threat` — ідеологічне обґрунтування цієї дії.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: 'And' would list two facts without explaining the ideological link between them.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: 'And' jedynie by wymieniało dwa fakty bez wyjaśnienia ideologicznego związku między nimi.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «and» просто перелічував би два факти без пояснення ідеологічного звʼязку між ними.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «and» просто перелічував би два факти без пояснення ідеологічного звʼязку між ними.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct: 'because' reveals the ideological justification — any opposition was perceived as an existential threat.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie: 'because' ujawnia ideologiczne uzasadnienie represji — jakakolwiek opozycja była postrzegana jako egzystencjalne zagrożenie.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Правильно: «because» розкриває ідеологічне обґрунтування репресій — будь-яка опозиція сприймалась як екзистенційна загроза.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Правильно: «because» розкриває ідеологічне обґрунтування репресій — будь-яка опозиція сприймалась як екзистенційна загроза.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: 'So' reverses the logic: 'suppressed dissent, SO opposition was perceived as a threat' — incorrect causal order.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: 'So' odwraca logikę: 'tłumił opozycję, WIĘC postrzegano jako zagrożenie' — błędna kolejność przyczynowo-skutkowa.

chatgpt_explanations.question: The regime suppressed dissent ruthlessly {a99} any form of opposition was perceived as an existential threat.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «so» перевертало б логіку: «придушував опозицію, ТОМУ сприймав як загрозу» — хибний причинно-наслідковий порядок.
